text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Narita Brian's weakness is her competitive spirit.
She relentlessly battles each opponent that
challenges her, burning up her stamina and
throwing off her natural pace.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I suggest a new racing style—don't react to any
challenge, hold back the building urge to
compete, and finally, let loose in an explosion of
speed.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Using this new strategy, Narita Brian wins her next
scrimmage. On top of that, she isn't exhausted
afterward—rather, she's brimming with energy.
